intended_use: Sonio Suspect is intended to assist interpreting physicians, during or after fetal ultrasound examinations, by automatically identifying and characterizing abnormal fetal ultrasound findings on detect
intended_use_full: Sonio Suspect is intended to assist interpreting physicians, during or after fetal ultrasound examinations, by automatically identifying and characterizing abnormal fetal ultrasound findings on detected views, using machine learning techniques. The device is intended for use as a concurrent reading aid on acquired images, during and/or after fetal ultrasound examinations.
target_condition: Abnormal fetal ultrasound findings suspicious for congenital anomalies
ground_truth: Ground truth method not explicitly stated in summary; inferred to be expert consensus or pathologic reference based on the clinical MRMC study design with multiple readers
other_metrics: Clinical performance: Overall AUC of 90.0% assisted vs 68.9% unassisted (AUC Delta 21.9% improvement). Individual abnormal findings showed sensitivity range of 87.7%-99.3% and specificity range of 81.5%-99.3%.
